---
title: List of Publications
toc: false
---

## Peer-Reviewed and Published

1. **Farhaz, R.**; Bischoff, F. A.; Stopkowicsz, S.; Blaschke, S. *Quantification of the basis set error for molecules in strong magnetic fields and general orientation.* **Journal of Chemical Physics** [[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0274736)] **2025**

2. Sardar, R.; Banik, R.; Ghosh, S.; **Farhaz, R.** *Drug-Induced Micelle-to-Supermicelle Transition in CTAB: Comparative Study with Acetylenic Gemini Surfactant via Experimental and DFT Approaches* [submitted]() **2026**

## In Draft

1. **Farhaz R.**, Rickert C., Bischoff F. A. *Helium Dimers and Trimers in Extreme Magnetic Fields : A
Geometry Optimization Study*
